heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 146 Authorization of appropriations
text: For the purposes of this chapter, there are authorized to be appropriated, out of any money in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, sums of not more than $50,000 for any one fiscal year.
notes: Similar Provisions; Repeal; Saving Clause; Delegation of Functions; Transfer of Property and PersonnelSee note preceding .section 141 of this title
